title: cyclosorus protectus
intro: Cyclosorus protectus, a species of fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, Cyclosorus protectus has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant are said to include the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Cyclosorus protectus can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, making it a valuable resource in traditional herbal remedies.
